title: Easter Fun Gel Window Clings - 20cm x 20cm, 1 Pack (3 Assorted Designs) - Easy Attach & Detach, Perfect for Easter Decorations
features: EASTER WINDOW CLINGS: Celebrate the Easter season with our delightful pack of gel window clings, perfect for turning your home into a festive and colorful haven. Adorn your windows with adorable bunnies, butterflies, flowers, eggs, and carrots that reflect the joyous spirit of Easter.

IMPRESSIVE SIZE: Our Easter fun gel window clings come in a generous 20cm x 20cm size, making them the ideal decoration to bring eye-catching holiday cheer to any room. Conveniently sized to fit most windows, these reusable clings are perfect for living rooms, kitchens, and even storefronts.

ASSORTED DESIGNS IN 1 PACK: Each pack contains a unique mix of three assorted designs, providing you with a versatile and dynamic array of Easter-themed decorations for your windows. Expand your festive décor and create a stunning Easter atmosphere everyone will love.

EASY ATTACH & DETACH: Our gel window clings are designed for a fuss-free decorating experience. Simply attach them to a clean window surface and enjoy the vibrant visuals. When the season is over, effortlessly detach and store them for next year. These clings are reusable and leave no sticky residue, ensuring a hassle-free clean-up.

PERFECT FOR EASTER DECORATIONS: Bring the magic of Easter into your home with our Easter fun gel window clings, ideal for creating cherished memories with your family and friends. They're perfect for elevating your Easter celebrations and inspiring joy and togetherness.
description: Introducing our Easter fun gel window clings, the perfect touch to add some festive spirit to your Easter celebrations. Each pack comes with three assorted designs, each measuring 20cm x 20cm, featuring vibrant and fun Easter-themed motifs that are sure to delight. These window clings are incredibly easy to attach and detach, meaning you can decorate your windows without the worry of leaving any residue or causing any damage. Brighten up your Easter with our delightful gel window clings and bring the joy of the season into your home.
